title: About Me
first_paragraph: 👋 Hi, I'm Sebastián! Software Architect & Backend Specialist.
second_paragraph: I design and build the robust logical infrastructure that powers secure, high-availability financial systems. My focus is entirely verticalized in the Banking and Fintech sectors, where I bridge the gap between complex business regulations and scalable, clean software architecture.
third_paragraph: 🎯 My Mission: To eliminate technical debt, mitigate security risks, and accelerate time-to-market using API-First methodologies, Domain-Driven Design (DDD), and Hexagonal Architecture. I specialize in turning high-transaction requirements into resilient cloud-native microservices that guarantee zero downtime and strict data governance.
fourth_paragraph: If you are looking for an architect to decouple legacy core systems, secure financial workflows (OAuth2/mTLS), or lead enterprise API governance, scroll down to explore my blueprints, ventures, and tech talks.
fifth_paragraph: Let's build the future of banking together—connect with me on LinkedIn or drop me an email! 🚀
sixth_paragraph: If you want to know more about me, you can contact me on LinkedIn or email me and we can talk 😀.
